label: Sufficient stability conditions for rotating screw-pinch follow from circle theorems and spectral bounds

provenance.source_span: Spectral estimates, stability conditions, and the rotating screwpinch Eliezer Hameiri Citation: Journal of Mathematical Physics 22, 2080 (1981); doi: 10.1063/1.525137 View online: http://dx.doi.org/10.1063/1.525137 View Table of Contents: http://scitation.aip.org/content/aip/journal

strengths: Connects rotating screw-pinch stability to spectral bounds and circle-theorem style constraints.
weaknesses: Sufficient conditions may be conservative and may not map exactly to the Atlas H1-H5 formulation.
